title: The Surroundings
subtitle: Discover the most beautiful spots around ArdenNest
intro: Although most guests prefer to stay on the property - the garden is big enough after all - there is plenty to experience in the area. Below you'll find our personal recommendations.

walks.title: Walks
walks.description: Our favorite walks nearby, tested by us and our guests. From quiet village walks to adventurous train walks.

cycling.title: Cycling
cycling.description: From flat RAVeL paths along the river to challenging mountain bike routes through the forests.

attractions.title: Attractions
attractions.description: The Ardennes have a lot to offer. These destinations are perfect for a day trip.

restaurants.title: Restaurants
restaurants.description: Our favorite eateries nearby. From cozy brasseries to gastronomic restaurants.

shops.title: Shops
shops.description: Everything you need for a carefree stay. From fresh bread to local products.

note: Most groups prefer to stay on the property - the garden is big enough for days of fun. But if you want to go out, we're ready with tips!
